positive: A stylized, central arrangement featuring a pair of whimsical woodland creatures (a fox and a rabbit) nestled among delicate bioluminescent flora and oversized leaves. The style should be modern kawaii illustration mixed with detailed nature etching, suitable for apparel printing. Focus on strong, clean outlines and silhouettes. The color palette should be deep emerald green, midnight blue, coral pink, and mustard yellow, contrasted against a clean white background. Use soft, glowing lighting effects emanating from the flora, creating depth and focus. The composition must be highly decorative and balanced, optimized for a square format print, evoking a sense of peaceful fantasy and joy.
negative: blurry, artifact, watermark, text, logo, signature, messy, ugly, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, noise, low resolution, grainy, realistic photography
